inputs.label: Number of Intervals
inputs.businessContext: Number of subintervals (will be rounded to nearest even number for Simpson's rule)

inputs.label: Coefficient a (quadratic)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient for x² term in f(x) = a·x² + b·x + c

inputs.label: Coefficient b (linear)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient for x term in f(x) = a·x² + b·x + c

inputs.label: Coefficient c (constant)
inputs.businessContext: Constant term in f(x) = a·x² + b·x + c

formulas.simpsonIntegral: ((lower, upper, n, a, b, c) => { if (n <= 0) return 0; const m = 2 * Math.round(n / 2); const h = (upper - lower) / m; const f = (x) => a*x*x + b*x + c; let sum = f(lower) + f(upper); for (let i = 1; i < m; i++) { const x = lower + i * h; sum += (i % 2 === 0 ? 2 : 4) * f(x); } return (h / 3) * sum; })(lowerLimit, upperLimit, numIntervals, coeffA, coeffB, coeffC)
formulas.trapezoidalIntegral: ((lower, upper, n, a, b, c) => { if (n <= 0) return 0; const h = (upper - lower) / n; const f = (x) => a*x*x + b*x + c; let sum = f(lower) + f(upper); for (let i = 1; i < n; i++) { sum += 2 * f(lower + i * h); } return (h / 2) * sum; })(lowerLimit, upperLimit, numIntervals, coeffA, coeffB, coeffC)
formulas.difference: Math.abs( ((lower, upper, n, a, b, c) => { if (n <= 0) return 0; const m = 2 * Math.round(n / 2); const h = (upper - lower) / m; const f = (x) => a*x*x + b*x + c; let sum = f(lower) + f(upper); for (let i = 1; i < m; i++) { const x = lower + i * h; sum += (i % 2 === 0 ? 2 : 4) * f(x); } return (h / 3) * sum; })(lowerLimit, upperLimit, numIntervals, coeffA, coeffB, coeffC) - ((lower, upper, n, a, b, c) => { if (n <= 0) return 0; const h = (upper - lower) / n; const f = (x) => a*x*x + b*x + c; let sum = f(lower) + f(upper); for (let i = 1; i < n; i++) { sum += 2 * f(lower + i * h); } return (h / 2) * sum; })(lowerLimit, upperLimit, numIntervals, coeffA, coeffB, coeffC) )
